title: Acacia Trunk
description:
Properties:
• branches ({ branch_canopy })
• trunk_decoration ({ decoration_block, decoration_blocks_sequence, decoration_chance, ... })
• trunk_width (int)
• trunk_height ({ base, intervals, min_height_for_canopy })
• trunk_lean ({ allow_diagonal_growth })

branches.title: Branches
branches.description:
Configuration object for branches.

Properties:
• branch_canopy ({ canopy, mangrove_canopy, acacia_canopy, ... })

branch_canopy.title: Branch Canopy
branch_canopy.description:
Configuration object for the canopy.

Properties:
• canopy ({ canopy_decoration, canopy_offset, min_width, ... })
• mangrove_canopy
• acacia_canopy ({ canopy_size, simplify_canopy })
• cherry_canopy ({ trunk_width })
• fancy_canopy ({ height, radius })
• mega_canopy ({ base_radius, core_width, simplify_canopy })
• mega_pine_canopy ({ base_radius, core_width })
• pine_canopy ({ base_radius })
• ... and 2 more properties

trunk_decoration.title: Trunk Decoration
trunk_decoration.description:
Configuration object for the trunk decoration.

Properties:
• decoration_block (string)
• decoration_blocks_sequence
• decoration_chance ({ numerator, denominator })
• num_steps (int)
• step_direction (string)

defaultSnippets.label: Trunk Decoration
defaultSnippets.description: Configuration object for the trunk decoration.

trunk_width.title: Trunk Width
trunk_width.description: The width of the tree trunk.

trunk_height.title: Trunk Height
trunk_height.description:
Configuration object for the trunk height.

Properties:
• base (int)
• intervals (string[])
• min_height_for_canopy (int)

defaultSnippets.label: Trunk Height

trunk_lean.title: Trunk Lean
trunk_lean.description:
Configuration object for diagonal branches.

Properties:
• allow_diagonal_growth (boolean)

allow_diagonal_growth.title: Allow Diagonal Growth
allow_diagonal_growth.description: If true, diagonal branches will be created.
